runtime_forbidden_hosts.reason: Public Stellarium Web host must not remain a runtime dependency.
Public Stellarium data host must not remain a runtime dependency.
NoctuaSky endpoints must be replaced by ORAS-owned APIs.
External GeoIP services must be removed from runtime location detection.
External reverse geocoding must not remain in runtime location flows.
External map tiles must not remain in runtime location flows.
Wikipedia summaries must be localized or disabled in runtime.

CDS live calls are admin/import-only, never runtime.
CelesTrak live calls are admin/import-only, never runtime.
MPC live calls are admin/import-only, never runtime.
OpenSky live calls are admin/import-only, never runtime.

known_unknowns.reason: Wikipedia article links are user-facing navigation, not runtime data fetches.
